title: Terminal — xterm.js pty app
description: OS terminal app built on xterm.js. Phase 0 runs an offline mock shell; Phase 2 proxies ptys to the Control Room agent (allowlist-gated, server-only WS). Adds no new host surface.

env.name: OS_AGENT_URL
env.description: Control Room agent base URL (Phase 2 pty bridge).

env.name: OS_AGENT_SECRET
env.description: Bearer for the agent bridge. NEVER NEXT_PUBLIC_.
